visual_description: A bald man in a dark jacket stands in a shop aisle aiming a handgun forward. A man in a yellow jacket lies on the floor with blood on his shirt, looking up. The scene shifts to a blurry figure in a white shirt being thrown, followed by a bright explosion engulfing a person, and finally a man in a white shirt holding a gun with a startled expression.
audio_description: Loud gunfire and a sudden explosion are heard. A startled exclamation follows.
